## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Abnormal Security and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows steady growth in clicks (35% WoW) and backlinks, with a recent surge in impressions (114k to 58k)](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Team to provide LLM benchmark/goal for Q4 by next week to track progress on LLM-related initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [New content strategy focuses on important keywords and vertical-specific series, with 27 new assignments pending approval](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Versus pages and competitor differentiation identified as areas for potential content optimization and education](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Impressions surged from 28k to 114k, settling at 58k in the past week](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Clicks growing steadily, up 35% week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Approaching 150 total articles published, with 70 new in the past three weeks](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [27 new assignments pending approval](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)

### Content Strategy and Keywords

  - [Focusing on creating content series around important keywords](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [New series: "Cost-effective strategies for threat detection in verticals"](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Balancing niche vertical keywords with high-volume general keywords](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Avoiding direct competitor comparisons, but leveraging existing "versus" pages](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Exploring LLM query data for new content ideas, carefully navigating competitor mentions](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)

### LLM Initiatives and Benchmarking

  - [Team to provide Q4 LLM benchmark/goal by next week](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [Aim to demonstrate progress in LLM-related work to executive leadership](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Exploring LLM query data for potential new content topics](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)

### Product Differentiation and Education

  - [Identified need to clearly explain Abnormal's unique approach (e.g., post-delivery analysis)](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Plan to create educational content on key differentiators and industry terms](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [Potential to refresh and optimize existing "versus" pages for competitors](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)

### Miscellaneous

  - [Request for historical data filtering in performance reports (in development)](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [GrowthX team member exploring Abnormal's solutions for their company](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mariana to send new keyword ideas for approval via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)

  - [Abdallah to provide sales contact for GrowthX team member interested in Abnormal's solutions](https://fathom.video/share/uPtky75fsC7tzkxgY8qBrLF5pstouRoE?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
